mapper.select: SELECT s.store_id, s.image_url, s.business_name, s.store_desc, s.addr_base, s.min_headcount, s.max_headcount, s.is_Battery_supported, GROUP_CONCAT(fc.name ORDER BY fc.name SEPARATOR ',') as food_category_names FROM stores s INNER JOIN store_food_categories sfc ON s.store_id = sfc.store_id INNER JOIN food_categories fc ON sfc.food_category_id = fc.food_category_id GROUP BY s.store_id ORDER BY s.store_id DESC LIMIT #{allStoreListReq.limit} OFFSET #{offset}
